mapper.insert: insert into work_order_transition_permission(from_status, to_status, role_code, allow_creator, allow_handler, allow_admin, is_auto_transition, created_at) values (#{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{roleCode}, #{allowCreator}, #{allowHandler}, #{allowAdmin}, #{isAutoTransition}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, from_status, to_status, role_code, allow_creator, allow_handler, allow_admin, is_auto_transition, created_at from work_order_transition_permission where id = #{id}
select id, from_status, to_status, role_code, allow_creator, allow_handler, allow_admin, is_auto_transition, created_at from work_order_transition_permission where from_status = #{fromStatus}
select id, from_status, to_status, role_code, allow_creator, allow_handler, allow_admin, is_auto_transition, created_at from work_order_transition_permission where role_code = #{roleCode}
select id, from_status, to_status, role_code, allow_creator, allow_handler, allow_admin, is_auto_transition, created_at from work_order_transition_permission order by id asc
